text.title: Retainer vs Project Rubric Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for `EngagementRubric` — 4-7 named dimensions on 1-5 BARS scales + evidence per score + aggregated recommendation.

list.item: Two reviewers reach scores differing by > 1 without calibration log — violates `r4-calibration-pass`.

example.note: Only 1 dimension; subjective overall dimension forbidden; evidence empty; reviewers < 2; recommendation outside enum; stale review.
